The '''spire falcon''' was a [[Bird/Legends|bird]] native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was at the top of the food chain of animals such as [[gully rat]]s, [[grate toad]]s, [[ferro-worm]]s, and [[trantor pigeon]]s.

{{Creature-stub}}
